title: Milk Lib
description: This is a high-version port of TropheusJ's milk-lib and dripstone-fluid-lib, with various milk-related extensions added
body:
This is a high-version port of **TropheusJ**'s milk-lib and dripstone-fluid-lib, with various milk-related extensions added.
This mod is primarily a library mod, but it adds **milk-related** extensions.
It adds:
> **bottled milk (milk bottle)**,
> **liquid milk**,
> **splash milk bottle**,
> **lingering milk bottle**,
> **milk cauldron**
The milk cauldron can remove the color from dyed leather equipment and other items under the DYEABLE tag, whiten shulker boxes, and whiten banners.
Note for the **Developers**: The mod **removed the methods** for **enabling** and **disabling** these components.
